title: Local Services Ads now run inside Performance Max
summary: Google is bringing Local Services Ads into Performance Max, so local advertisers get PMax's cross-surface automation (Search, Maps and more) with automatic Google Business Profile syncing. It unifies LSA management with the rest of a PMax setup.

title: Demand Gen campaigns get business data feeds for dynamic ads
summary: Google added business data feeds to Demand Gen, letting advertisers run dynamic, data-driven creative without a Google Merchant Center feed. Opens personalized Demand Gen ads to non-retail advertisers.

title: Video campaign groups roll out globally for reach & frequency
summary: YouTube reach-and-frequency optimization for video campaign groups is now available worldwide, letting advertisers coordinate R&F across multiple campaigns while keeping each campaign's own settings. Google says Display & Video 360 support is coming next.

title: New AI transparency labels and disclosure tools for ads
summary: Google is rolling out AI transparency features that help people understand the ads they see and give advertisers simple tools to disclose AI-generated or AI-edited content. Advertisers should review the new disclosure options.

title: Google drops the $50K spend gate on Lead Form assets
summary: Google removed the $50,000 historical-spend requirement for native Lead Form assets, opening the in-ad lead-gen format to far more advertisers, and added new integrations plus simpler eligibility. Smaller accounts can now use lead forms directly in their ads.

title: Brand Lift Studies add an enhanced, higher-sensitivity option
summary: Advertisers can now choose between standard and enhanced Brand Lift Studies; the enhanced tier trades a higher budget for more sensitive measurement of campaign impact, helping brand advertisers detect smaller lifts.

title: Bulk-link multiple Google Ads accounts to one GA4 property
summary: Google Ads now supports bulk linking of multiple accounts to a single GA4 property, cutting the manual per-account setup that agencies and large MCC structures deal with.

title: Google Tag Manager adds guided setup for Ads purchase tracking
summary: Google Tag Manager introduced a guided flow that auto-configures the key components for Google Ads purchase-conversion tracking, reducing the chance of misconfigured conversions.

title: Recommendations tab now estimates missed growth (beta)
summary: A new Google Ads beta surfaces estimated clicks, conversions and revenue you may be losing to limited budgets and low bids, shown directly in the Recommendations tab.

title: LinkedIn adds AI creative tools to Campaign Manager
summary: LinkedIn rolled out AI-powered creative options in Campaign Manager: AI ad-copy generation and the ability to auto-generate multiple ad variations (alternate headlines and intro text) from an existing ad. Speeds up ad creation and testing. (Reported in SocialBee's July 2026 LinkedIn roundup.)

title: LinkedIn introduces a 'Flexible' campaign creation flow
summary: LinkedIn added a new 'Flexible' campaign creation process in Campaign Manager, giving advertisers a more adaptable setup path. (Reported in SocialBee's July 2026 LinkedIn roundup.)
